---
title: "Poblacion"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(fs)
root <- normalizePath("..\\..\\..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
read_csv_safe <- function(...) readr::read_csv(fs::path(root, ...), show_col_types = FALSE)
pop <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","POPULATION","arequipa_province_population_denominators.csv")
qc_pop <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","QC","qc_population_denominators.csv")
```

```{r}
qc_pop %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
pop %>% group_by(year, sex) %>% summarise(population = sum(population), .groups = "drop") %>% knitr::kable()
```
